business.name: Muddy Buddy's Plumbing
business.tagline: No job too muddy, no problem too messy

hero.headline: The plumber Huntsville *actually* calls back
hero.subheadline: 4.9 stars from 387 neighbors who know — when pipes burst or drains back up, we show up ready to work

services_section.label: THE WORK
services_section.heading: Every pipe, drain, and fixture
services_section.subheading: From emergency repairs to planned installations — we handle whatever's flooding, clogged, or broken

services.title: Emergency Plumbing
services.description: Burst pipes, overflowing toilets, water heater failures — the stuff that can't wait until Monday morning

services.title: Drain Cleaning
services.description: Kitchen sinks backing up, shower water standing ankle-deep, main line blockages that smell like trouble

services.title: Water Heater Service
services.description: No hot water for showers, strange noises from the basement, or time to upgrade before the old one quits

services.title: Fixture Installation
services.description: New faucets, toilet replacements, garbage disposals — making your kitchen and bathrooms work like they should

services.title: Leak Detection & Repair
services.description: High water bills, wet spots in walls, or that drip you hear at 3am — we find it and fix it right

about.heading: Known around Huntsville since day one
about.body: Started with a truck, some tools, and the idea that plumbing problems shouldn't ruin your week. Word spread through neighborhoods — we show up when we say we will, explain what's broken in plain English, and fix it right the first time. That's how you get 387 five-star reviews from people who've actually had us in their homes.

reviews.name: Mary B.
reviews.text: Arrived exactly when promised. Professional, polite, and handled our problem fast. Would definitely recommend.

reviews.name: Shameca
reviews.text: Josh was outstanding — punctual, knowledgeable, and explained everything clearly. Fixed our kitchen sink perfectly.

reviews.name: Barbara C.
reviews.text: Polite, kind, and incredibly fast work. Highly recommend for any plumbing issues you might have.

reviews.name: Rick M.
reviews.text: Heard about Buddy through our HOA. Fair pricing and we were impressed with his professionalism from the start.

service_areas.label: COVERAGE AREA
service_areas.heading: Serving North Alabama
service_areas.subheading: From Madison to Arab, we cover the communities that know us best

cta.heading: Ready to fix what's broken?
cta.body: No surprises, no runaround — just honest plumbing work from the team Huntsville trusts most
